Container.Name: opencode-mobile
Container.Overview: Runs opencode (open-source AI coding agent CLI) with its built-in web UI, so you can drive it from a phone browser over WireGuard. Image is built and published automatically by GitHub Actions on every change plus a daily rebuild. Do not expose the WebUI port to the internet; access it via WireGuard VPN into your LAN.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the opencode web UI

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: opencode's whole home directory - config, provider credentials, session history (persisted, covered by CA Backup)

Config.Name: Server Password
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password for the web UI - generate with: openssl rand -base64 24

Config.Name: GitHub Token
Config.Description: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic, repo scope) for git push/pull from inside the container

Config.Name: Share
Config.Description: Share folder for exchanging files between the container and other systems (e.g., transfer outputs, configs)
